<var>
$DPS$ = ((Damage * 2) + Critical Damage) / 3 / Swingrate
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-COST$ = 800; 350; 1250; 4500; 17500
$FNC-PVP-COST$ = 1000; 350; 1250; 4500; 17500
$FNC-DETECTION$ = 1; 3;
$FNC-UPGRADE$ = Night Shift; Heavier Stick; Stunning Blows; Class Foxtrot Defense Level
$FNC-UPGRADEICON$ = 11415010529; 11415012702; 11415014676; 11415015418
$FNC-ROFBUG$ = Swingrate
$CREF$ = <ref name=crit>Every third hit is a critical hit. Critical hits increase damage by 50%. If the damage is a decimal, the damage is rounded up.</ref>
$DREF$ = <ref name=dps>Calculated as ((Damage × 2) + Critical Damage) ÷ 3 ÷ Swingrate.</ref>
$TREF$ = <ref name=thirdhit>Only happens every third hit.</ref>
</var>
<div class="mobile-tabber"><tabber>
|-|Regular =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Critical Damage$CREF$ !! Swingrate !! Range !! Stun Time !! DPS$DREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 6 || 9 || 0.6 || 6 || 1$TREF$ || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 8 || 12 || 0.6 || 6 || 1$TREF$ || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 16 || 24 || 0.6 || 7 || 1.75$TREF$ || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 35 || 53 || 0.6 || 7 || 1.75 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 85 || 128 || 0.5 || 8 || 2.5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
|-|PVP =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Critical Damage$CREF$ !! Swingrate !! Range !! Stun Time !! DPS$DREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 6 || 9 || 0.65 || 6 || 0.65$TREF$ || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 8 || 12 || 0.65 || 6 || 0.65$TREF$ || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 16 || 24 || 0.6 || 7 || 1.25$TREF$ || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 35 || 53 || 0.6 || 7 || 1.25 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 85 || 128 || 0.5 || 7.5 || 1.75 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
</tabber></div>
